title: Skypiea Says Goodbye
description: The crew enjoys the peaceful aftermath of Enel’s defeat while Skypiea begins turning war into celebration.
scene: Across pages 5, 6, 7, 8, this scene focuses on Luffy, Nami, Usopp, Zoro, Sanji. The crew enjoys the peaceful aftermath of Enel’s defeat while Skypiea begins turning war into celebration.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: This is what a rubber band is?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: You'd all like some iron, right?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I want some too! Is that okay!?

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: This snake sure sleeps like a log.

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: You even listening to me, Usopp!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Let's bring it up on Yearth.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Look over there! This must be,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: What do the writings say, chief?

summary: The crew enjoys the peaceful aftermath of Enel’s defeat while Skypiea begins turning war into celebration.
